name: Georgia Pecan Orange Biscotti
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Toast pecans in a 9-inch pie pan for 5 to 7 minutes, or until deeply browned and glossy. Monitor closely to prevent burning.
3. Finely chop the pecans and set aside.
4. Sift together flour, baking powder, and salt.
5. In a large bowl, combine butter and sugar. Beat with an electric mixer on medium speed until light and fluffy.
6. Add vanilla, egg, and orange zest; mix well.
7. Fold in dry ingredients and chopped pecans; blend thoroughly.
8. Line a baking pan with parchment paper or aluminum foil.
9. Form dough into a 3-by-12 inch strip, slightly mounded in the center for thicker middle slices.
10. Bake on the middle rack for 18 to 20 minutes until lightly golden.
11. Let cool for 10 minutes before reducing oven temperature to 300°F.
12. Slice the cooled loaf diagonally into 3/4-inch-thick pieces (about 12-16 slices).
13. Turn slices cut-side down and spread evenly on the pan.
14. Return pan to the oven; bake for another 20 minutes, flipping halfway through.
15. Turn off the heat and let cookies cool in the oven for 1 to 2 hours before storing in an airtight container.
